title: Malignity
description: Malignity is a post-endgame progression mod that transforms Minecraft's late-game into a dark and epic experience, introducing corrupted materials, dynamic combat systems, and an implicit narrative of power with consequences.
body:
A dark progression mod that expands Minecraft's endgame with corrupted materials, runic equipment, and ancient power.

✨ FEATURES
📦 NEW MATERIALS:
Malignity: A superior evil material to Netherite

Red Runic: The ultimate fusion of Netherite + Malignity

⚔️ EQUIPMENT:
Malignity armor and sword

Red Runic axe and sword

Balanced stats for post-endgame
